summary: Manual clipboard-to-notes, iCloud status in Notes, and step-by-step inbox loading.

introduced: Notes sidebar shows iCloud account, sync state, and last sync time
Inbox loader explains each step while Gmail connects, signs in, renders, and syncs unread counts
changed: Clipboard clips are only added to Notes when you tap Save to Note — not on every copy or pin
Google sign-in during inbox load uses a non-blocking banner so you can complete authentication
fixed: Inbox loading overlay stays visible until Gmail finishes rendering and background unread sync completes
Reduced delay before post-sign-in mail sync starts
removed: Automatic Save clipboard to Notes setting — use Save to Note on individual clips instead
